mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1."name", t1.code, t1.description, t1.script, t1.variables, t1.publish_status, t1.model_status, t1.publish_time, t1.group_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time, t1.updater, t1.update_time FROM develop_script_sql_task t1
ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC LIMIT #{query.size} OFFSET #{query.offset}

SELECT t1.id, t1."name", t1.code, t1.description, t1.script, t1.variables, t1.publish_status, t1.model_status, t1.publish_time, t1.group_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time, t1.updater, t1.update_time FROM develop_script_sql_task t1
ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC
SELECT code FROM develop_script_sql_task WHERE model_status = 0 AND code LIKE concat(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY code DESC LIMIT 1
